SELECT
  sme.avg_consumption - lam.avg_consumption AS Diff_SME_LAM,
  lam.avg_consumption - kam.avg_consumption AS Diff_LAM_KAM,
  kam.avg_consumption - sme.avg_consumption AS Diff_KAM_SME
FROM
  (
    SELECT total_2013 / cnt AS avg_consumption
    FROM (
      SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2013, COUNT(*) AS cnt
      FROM yearmonth y
      JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
      WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND c.Segment = 'SME'
        AND y.CustomerID IN (
          SELECT CustomerID
          FROM (
            SELECT y2.CustomerID, SUM(y2.Consumption) AS total_cust
            FROM yearmonth y2
            JOIN customers c2 ON c2.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
            WHERE y2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
              AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND c2.Segment = 'SME'
            GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
          )
          WHERE total_cust = (
            SELECT MIN(total_cust)
            FROM (
              SELECT y3.CustomerID, SUM(y3.Consumption) AS total_cust
              FROM yearmonth y3
              JOIN customers c3 ON c3.CustomerID = y3.CustomerID
              WHERE y3.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                AND c3.Currency = 'CZK'
                AND c3.Segment = 'SME'
              GROUP BY y3.CustomerID
            )
          )
        )
    )
  ) AS sme
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT total_2013 / cnt AS avg_consumption
    FROM (
      SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2013, COUNT(*) AS cnt
      FROM yearmonth y
      JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
      WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
        AND y.CustomerID IN (
          SELECT CustomerID
          FROM (
            SELECT y2.CustomerID, SUM(y2.Consumption) AS total_cust
            FROM yearmonth y2
            JOIN customers c2 ON c2.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
            WHERE y2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
              AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND c2.Segment = 'LAM'
            GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
          )
          WHERE total_cust = (
            SELECT MIN(total_cust)
            FROM (
              SELECT y3.CustomerID, SUM(y3.Consumption) AS total_cust
              FROM yearmonth y3
              JOIN customers c3 ON c3.CustomerID = y3.CustomerID
              WHERE y3.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                AND c3.Currency = 'CZK'
                AND c3.Segment = 'LAM'
              GROUP BY y3.CustomerID
            )
          )
        )
    )
  ) AS lam
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT total_2013 / cnt AS avg_consumption
    FROM (
      SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2013, COUNT(*) AS cnt
      FROM yearmonth y
      JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
      WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND c.Segment = 'KAM'
        AND y.CustomerID IN (
          SELECT CustomerID
          FROM (
            SELECT y2.CustomerID, SUM(y2.Consumption) AS total_cust
            FROM yearmonth y2
            JOIN customers c2 ON c2.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
            WHERE y2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
              AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND c2.Segment = 'KAM'
            GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
          )
          WHERE total_cust = (
            SELECT MIN(total_cust)
            FROM (
              SELECT y3.CustomerID, SUM(y3.Consumption) AS total_cust
              FROM yearmonth y3
              JOIN customers c3 ON c3.CustomerID = y3.CustomerID
              WHERE y3.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                AND c3.Currency = 'CZK'
                AND c3.Segment = 'KAM'
              GROUP BY y3.CustomerID
            )
          )
        )
    )
  ) AS kam	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT seg_stats.Segment,
       seg_stats.pct_increase,
       seg_rank.increase_type
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment AS Segment,
           ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0) /
           NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pct_increase
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
      AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) AS seg_stats
JOIN (
    SELECT Segment, 'biggest' AS increase_type
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment AS Segment,
               ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0) /
               NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pct_increase
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
          AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
          AND SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
        GROUP BY c.Segment
        ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Segment, 'lowest' AS increase_type
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment AS Segment,
               ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0) /
               NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pct_increase
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
          AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
          AND SUBSTR(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
        GROUP BY c.Segment
        ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
) AS seg_rank
ON seg_rank.Segment = seg_stats.Segment	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT ((last_last.incremental_ms - champ.champ_ms) * 1.0 / last_last.incremental_ms) * 100 AS percent_faster
FROM (
  SELECT
    ra.raceId,
    (
      CAST(SUBSTR(re.time, 1, INSTR(re.time, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 3600000 +
      CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
      CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1), '.') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
      CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1 + INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re.time, INSTR(re.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1), '.')) AS INTEGER)
    ) AS champ_ms
  FROM races ra
  JOIN results re ON re.raceId = ra.raceId
  WHERE ra.year = 2008
    AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    AND re.positionOrder = 1
    AND re.time IS NOT NULL
) AS champ
JOIN (
  SELECT
    ra.raceId,
    (champ_ms + inc_ms) AS incremental_ms
  FROM races ra
  JOIN (
    SELECT
      re.raceId,
      (
        CAST(SUBSTR(re.time, 3, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(re.time, 6, 2) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(re.time, 9) AS INTEGER)
      ) AS inc_ms
    FROM results re
    WHERE re.time IS NOT NULL
      AND SUBSTR(re.time, 1, 1) = '+'
  ) AS inc ON inc.raceId = ra.raceId
  JOIN (
    SELECT
      ra2.raceId,
      (
        CAST(SUBSTR(re2.time, 1, INSTR(re2.time, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 3600000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1), '.') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1 + INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(re2.time, INSTR(re2.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1), '.')) AS INTEGER)
      ) AS champ_ms
    FROM races ra2
    JOIN results re2 ON re2.raceId = ra2.raceId
    WHERE ra2.year = 2008
      AND ra2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
      AND re2.positionOrder = 1
      AND re2.time IS NOT NULL
  ) AS c ON c.raceId = ra.raceId
  WHERE ra.year = 2008
    AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
) AS last_last ON last_last.raceId = champ.raceId
JOIN races ra3 ON ra3.raceId = champ.raceId
WHERE last_last.incremental_ms = (
  SELECT MAX(c.champ_ms + (
    CAST(SUBSTR(r4.time, 3, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(r4.time, 6, 2) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(r4.time, 9) AS INTEGER)
  ))
  FROM results r4
  JOIN races ra4 ON ra4.raceId = r4.raceId
  JOIN (
    SELECT
      ra5.raceId,
      (
        CAST(SUBSTR(r5.time, 1, INSTR(r5.time, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 3600000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1), '.') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1 + INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(r5.time, INSTR(r5.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1), '.')) AS INTEGER)
      ) AS champ_ms

  WHERE ra4.year = 2008

       SUM(t.amount) AS total_withdrawal
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = t.account_id
JOIN district d ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ'
  AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawal DESC
LIMIT 10	----- bird -----	financial

486:
SELECT COUNT(c.client_id) AS male_clients
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M'
  AND d.A15 = (
    SELECT d2.A15
    FROM district d2
    GROUP BY d2.A15
    ORDER BY d2.A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
  )	----- bird -----	financial
487:
SELECT d.client_id
FROM disp AS d
JOIN trans AS t ON t.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
  AND t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
  AND SUBSTR(t.date, 1, 4) = '1998'
  AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(t2.amount)
    FROM trans AS t2
    WHERE t2.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
      AND SUBSTR(t2.date, 1, 4) = '1998'
  )	----- bird -----	financial
488:
SELECT disp.type AS account_type
FROM disp
JOIN account ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN district ON district.district_id = account.district_id
LEFT JOIN loan ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE disp.type <> 'OWNER'
  AND loan.loan_id IS NULL
  AND district.A11 > 8000
  AND district.A11 <= 9000	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE d.A11 > 10000 AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM disp di
  JOIN account a ON a.account_id = di.account_id
  WHERE di.client_id = c.client_id
)	----- bird -----	financial
492:
SELECT
  (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(l.date,1,4) = '1997' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(l.date,1,4) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(l.date,1,4) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS growth_rate_percent
FROM loan l
JOIN disp d ON d.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN client c ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M'
  AND SUBSTR(l.date,1,4) IN ('1996','1997')	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT
  (SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS percentage_male_clients_weekly_statements
FROM account
JOIN disp ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN client ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
WHERE account.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND disp.type = 'OWNER'	----- bird -----	financial
495:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN client c ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN district di ON di.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  AND di.A11 = (
    SELECT MIN(di2.A11)
    FROM client c2
    JOIN district di2 ON di2.district_id = c2.district_id
    WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
      AND c2.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  )	----- bird -----	financial

       CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age
FROM client AS c
JOIN disp AS d ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN card AS ca ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER'	----- bird -----	financial
